## LibraryRuntime.scaleConfectionByFactor() function

Scales a confection by a factor using the golden version.

This function applies a linear scale factor to the golden version's yield.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function scaleConfectionByFactor<T extends ConfectionData>(confection: T, factor: number, options?: IConfectionScaleOptions): Result<IScaledConfection<T>>;
```
